rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §22.092 governs a registry of persons ineligible for public school employment; it is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 22.092. REGISTRY OF PERSONS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR EMPLOYMENT IN PUBLIC SCHOOLS.
_note: Rule text concerns school employment eligibility registry; no bearing on homestead exemption valuation.
